description.value:
Disease: Demon Fever — Severity: [Deadly] — Stage 2

Effects: Disoriented condition + Dazed (once per long rest, the character experiences an episode lasting 1 hour where they are Dazed and cannot be reasoned with).

Recovery: [[/save type=fortitude]] at end of each long rest (Hard task — 2 successes cures; 1 success = no change; 0 = worsen). Magical healing alone suppresses symptoms for 24 hours but does not cure; Major Restoration cures completely.

system.vector: Daemon claws or bites, nexus-adjacent contamination, exposure to corrupted pneuma
system.specialRules: Once per long rest: character experiences a 1-hour Dazed episode and cannot be reasoned with.

recovery.chatMessage: Make a [[/save type=fortitude]] to recover from Demon Fever (Stage 2).
